admin.intro: Connect lets external services automate your forum. Create an API key, then use it in Zapier, Make, IFTTT, n8n, or anything that speaks webhooks. Each key acts as a user and signs its outgoing webhooks with its secret.
admin.confirm_revoke: Revoke “{label}”? Any automation using it will stop immediately.
admin.zapier_intro: Connect your forum to 6,000+ apps — post new discussions to a Facebook Page, Slack, or Discord, add members to a mailing list, log activity to a spreadsheet, and more. Set it all up right here, no code needed.
admin.zapier_step_key: Create an API key further down this page (Read + Write).
admin.zapier_step_open: Open Connect on Zapier using the button below, then choose “Accept invite”.
admin.zapier_step_build: Build a Zap — pick a trigger like “New Discussion”, and enter your forum's URL plus the API key when Zapier asks.
admin.zapier_builder_pending: Building Zaps without leaving this page is coming later, once Connect's Zapier integration is listed publicly. It will switch on by itself — you won't have to configure anything.
admin.zapier_advanced_help: Only needed if you've published your own Zapier integration instead of using Connect's. Leave both fields empty to use Connect's.
admin.zapier_client_id_help: Find it in Zapier's Developer Platform under Embed → Settings → Credentials (public integrations only).
admin.zapier_build_anything_help: Browse every trigger and action, and manage the Zaps you've already created.
admin.no_keys: No keys yet — create one above to connect a service.
admin.no_subs: Nothing is subscribed yet. When a Zap (or similar) turns on, it appears here.
admin.rules_intro: Rules run right here on your forum — no external service needed. Pick a trigger, add conditions, and choose what happens.
admin.no_rules: No rules yet. Create one to automate something automatically.
